data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe's architecture utilizes a cloud-based infrastructure for scalable computing and storage.
data.technical_spec: AWS and Microsoft Azure for IaaS and PaaS solutions.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Microservices are employed to decouple services and enhance scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Implementation using Docker containers and Kubernetes orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Global CDN is used to deliver content quickly and efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Akamai and Cloudflare provide caching and delivery acceleration.

data.title: API Management
data.description: APIs are used extensively for integrations and intra-service communication.
data.technical_spec: API Gateway with rate limiting and security features.

data.title: Database Architecture
data.description: Use of both SQL and NoSQL databases to handle different types of data.
data.technical_spec: MySQL and MongoDB for structured and unstructured data respectively.
